name: iteration01-complete-polish
description: Verify generated graphics, compact signage, wall HUD, original avatar preservation, starter fist, Titan landmark, road dressing, and dynamic tutorial guidance.

args.code:
local H=game:GetService("HttpService")
local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG
local decor=root.Polish["City Decor"]
local tier=root.Polish["Wall Tier Frames"]
local egg=root.Interactables["Pet Egg Machine"]
local rebirth=root.Interactables["Rebirth Shrine"]
local parts,graphics,spawnGraphics,worldDecals,barricades=0,0,0,0,0
for _,d in ipairs(root:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA("BasePart") then parts+=1 elseif d:IsA("ImageLabel") and d.Image=="rbxassetid://82590428870038" then graphics+=1 elseif d:IsA("ImageLabel") and d.Image=="rbxassetid://125153703372122" then spawnGraphics+=1 elseif d:IsA("Decal") and (d.Texture=="rbxassetid://82590428870038" or d.Texture=="rbxassetid://125153703372122") then worldDecals+=1 end end
for _,d in ipairs(decor:GetChildren()) do if string.find(d.Name,"Emergency Barricade",1,true) then barricades+=1 end end
return H:JSONEncode({parts=parts,graphics=graphics,spawnGraphics=spawnGraphics,worldDecals=worldDecals,barricades=barricades,dnaSign=decor:FindFirstChild("DNA Lab Compact Sign")~=nil,rebirthSign=decor:FindFirstChild("Evac Portal Compact Sign")~=nil,eggText=egg:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("SurfaceGui")==nil,rebirthText=rebirth:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("SurfaceGui")==nil,titanPylons=tier:FindFirstChild("Titan Containment Pylon -1")~=nil and tier:FindFirstChild("Titan Containment Pylon 1")~=nil,titanCore=tier:FindFirstChild("Titan Reactor Core")~=nil,hazard=tier:FindFirstChild("Titan Arena Hazard Stripe 1")~=nil})

local H=game:GetService("HttpService")
local p=game.Players.LocalPlayer
local gui=p.PlayerGui:WaitForChild("PunchWallHUD")
gui.GameMenu.Visible=true
game.ReplicatedStorage.PunchWallEvents.ActionRequest:FireServer({action="RequestSync"})
task.wait(.4)
local banner=gui.GameMenu.Content:FindFirstChild("Hero City Generated Banner")
local gauntlet=(p.Character or p.CharacterAdded:Wait()):FindFirstChild("Equipped Kaiju Gauntlet")
local spines,knuckles,wedges=0,0,0
if gauntlet then for _,d in ipairs(gauntlet:GetDescendants()) do if string.find(d.Name,"Starter Mutation",1,true) then spines+=1 elseif string.find(d.Name,"Closed Knuckle",1,true) then knuckles+=1 elseif d:IsA("WedgePart") then wedges+=1 end end end
local result=H:JSONEncode({banner=banner~=nil,image=banner and banner.Image or "",spines=spines,knuckles=knuckles,wedges=wedges,closed=gauntlet and gauntlet:GetAttribute("ClosedFist"),display=gauntlet and gauntlet:GetAttribute("DisplayName"),hitFlash=gui:FindFirstChild("HitFlash")~=nil,targetHUD=gui:FindFirstChild("TargetWallHUD")~=nil})
gui.GameMenu.Visible=false
return result

steps.label: menu graphic and starter fist preserve original avatar

args.code:
local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation
c:Invoke("Reset")
c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=60,WallLevel=1,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0})
local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1]
p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame=CFrame.new(-2,7,-13)
c:Invoke("HitWall","Brick Wall")
return true

local H=game:GetService("HttpService")
local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD
local hud=g.TargetWallHUD
return H:JSONEncode({visible=hud.Visible,title=hud:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("TextLabel").Text,fill=hud.HealthTrack.HealthFill.Size.X.Scale,context=g.ContextTarget.Visible})
